projectItem.title: Set Up
projectItem.description: In Lab 1, I established the foundational development environment. We configured file servers on Microsoft Azure, created GitHub accounts, and integrated our local machines with remote servers and repositories to enable version-controlled web development.

projectItem.title: Resume
projectItem.description: In Lab 2, I used HTML and CSS to create a resume. I also organized my local repository structures, and practiced committing, pushing, and deploying files from my local enviornment to the Azure web server using GitHub Desktop.

projectItem.title: Website
projectItem.description: In Lab 3, I deisgned and deployed this website. I used HTML and CSS to implement consistent navigation and layout elements that reflect my personal style. I also practiced good DevOps using Git branching, which allows developers to safely experiment with new changes without affecting the main version of their code.

projectItem.title: RSS & Atom
projectItem.description: In Lab 4, I created an RSS feed and Atom feed for my website. I developed a valid XMLdocument containing links to labs and integrated the feed into my homepage.

projectItem.title: Contact Info Form
projectItem.description: In Lab 5, I built an interactive HTML form using JavaScript. I implemented input validation, dynamic text behavior, and user feedback alerts to improve usability.

projectItem.title: jQuery
projectItem.description: In Lab 6, I practiced using jQuery to create dynamic web intereactions. I built interactive elements such as animated text, clickable lists, and a functional image gallery while learning how to use event delegation and DOM manipulation effectively.

projectItem.title: Group Project Mockup
projectItem.description: In Lab 7, I created a prototype of the website I plan to create for my group project using Balsamiq. Prototypes are used to explore and test design ideas quickly and receive feedback. In this way, we can make edits based on what we can see in our prototype, rather than make edits as we create the final product.

projectItem.title: JavaScript, JSON and AJAX
projectItem.description: In Lab 8, I created a JSON file for my labs. I used the AJAX method to read my JSON file and dynamically create my lab cards for my Labs landing page.

projectItem.title: PHP & MySQL
projectItem.description: In Lab 9, I created and managed a MySQL database and connected it to PHP pages to display data from my tables. I built an actors and movies table and wrote PHP pages to interact with these tables. I practiced MySQL, PHP, and dynamic database-driven webpages.

projectItem.title: Deployment
projectItem.description: In Lab 10, I moved my website from development to production. I secured sensitive labs (Lab 1 & Lab 9) while removing security from public-facing pages.
